summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. Four PRs are independent maintainer-ready candidates but are not merge recommendations because the artifact does not include the required complete merge preflight and Codex /review proof; one broad i18n PR needs maintainer judgment due scope size and apparent cross-locale/generated-file churn.

actions.reason: Independent PR in this inventory shard; keep open for ordinary maintainer review or a later repair/merge-preflight run.
Independent narrow CLI PR, but failing checks block merge and the artifact is insufficient for an executable repair plan.
Independent small PR with passing checks, but missing merge preflight blocks a merge recommendation.
Independent Android PR with passing checks, but missing merge preflight blocks a merge recommendation.
Maintainer judgment is needed on whether the broad generated i18n churn is intentional and acceptable for this shard before merge or repair planning.

needs_human: #80924 requires maintainer judgment for broad_code_delta and scope mismatch: body claims zh-CN Dreaming localization only, but the hydrated diff spans 52 files across many locales and i18n metadata/generated files.
